overall.description: Gameplay footage from a medieval fantasy RPG showing a third-person character exploring a stone castle interior. The player follows an NPC through a torch-lit hall with vaulted ceilings, then approaches a locked wooden door in a side corridor before turning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone castle great hall with vaulted ceiling and wooden furniture

agents.ego_description: following the NPC woman through the torch-lit stone hall

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player toward the left side of the hall

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting
stone stairs ascending along the left wall
wooden table with chairs and items on top

segments.scene_description: The player follows an NPC through a medieval stone hall with high vaulted ceilings illuminated by wall sconces. The space contains wooden furniture including a dining table and benches, with a stone staircase visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor leading to a locked wooden door

events.description: moving from the main hall into a narrower side corridor
attempting to open the locked wooden door, revealing it requires a key
turning around and walking back toward the main hall after finding the door locked

agents.ego_description: approaching the locked door, attempting to open it, then turning back when finding it requires a key

notable_agents.action: standing in the main hall visible in the distance as the player turns back

entered.detail: close stone walls of the narrow corridor
heavy wooden door with metal bands and a lock
wooden shelving unit with pottery and items
tall narrow window with light filtering through

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the main hall and enters a narrow stone corridor, approaching a large locked wooden door. After attempting to open the door and discovering it requires a key, the player turns back, catching a glimpse of the NPC in the distant hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, torch-lit medieval hall into a restrictive stone corridor. It begins by trailing an NPC through a spacious interior featuring high vaulted ceilings, wall sconces, and heavy wooden dining furniture, with a stone staircase lining the left side. As the player leaves the main hall, the environment shifts into a narrow stone corridor that leads directly toward a large, locked wooden door. After a failed attempt to open the door, the camera turns back toward the entrance, finally catching a distant glimpse of the NPC still waiting in the expansive hall.
